summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 3 features: Municipality photos/content seeding, Orizaba complete data (prestadores, events, encargado), and Notifications system. All 12 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working.
passed_tests: GET /api/municipios?pueblo_magico=true returns municipalities with foto_portada_url
GET /api/municipios/orizaba returns complete data (descripcion, historia, que_hacer, clima, altitud, como_llegar, tags, fotos)
GET /api/prestadores?municipio_id={orizaba_id} returns 4 prestadores
GET /api/eventos?municipio_id={orizaba_id} returns 2 events
Encargado Orizaba login works with encargado.orizaba@veracruzcontigo.gob.mx / Orizaba2024!
GET /api/auth/me returns encargado data after login
GET /api/notifications requires authentication (returns 401 without auth)
GET /api/notifications works for authenticated encargado
PUT /api/notifications/{id}/read requires authentication
SuperAdmin login works with superadmin@veracruzcontigo.gob.mx / VeracruzAdmin2024!
POST /api/admin/check-spikes works for superadmin
Homepage municipios have photos
Homepage loads with Pueblos Mágicos section showing real photos
Orizaba municipality page shows complete data with tabs (Información, Galería, Servicios, Eventos)
Orizaba Galería tab shows 5 photos
Orizaba Servicios tab shows 4 prestadores (Hotel Fiesta Cascada, Panadería La Fama, Teleférico Tours, Gran Café)
Orizaba Eventos tab shows 2 events (Festival de la Primavera, Feria del Pan)
Encargado Dashboard loads with Orizaba data
Notifications bell icon visible in encargado dashboard header
Notifications panel opens when clicking bell icon
SuperAdmin dashboard loads correctly
seed_data_creation: seed_municipio_photos_and_content() creates: Orizaba encargado account, 4 prestadores (Hotel Fiesta Cascada, Panadería La Fama, Teleférico Tours, Gran Café), 2 events (Festival de la Primavera, Feria del Pan), 5 gallery photos, and complete municipality data for 9 municipalities
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 features fully tested and working. Municipality photos seeding, Orizaba complete data, and notifications system all verified. The notifications panel shows 'Sin notificaciones' because no spike alerts have been triggered yet (requires analytics data with >50% increase in views). All auth flows working with httpOnly cookies.
